target_path.description: Caminho relativo ao PROJECT_ROOT para escopo do scan (ex: 'backend/', 'frontend/package.json')

target_url.description: Application URL for DAST scan (staging or production)

cve_id.description: Specific CVE ID for auto_patch or investigation

cvss_threshold.description: Minimum CVSS threshold for reporting/acting. Default: 4.0

pr_auto_open.description: Se true, abre PR automaticamente para CVEs acima do cvss_threshold. Default: true para CVSS >= 7.0

branch.description: Target branch for scanning (default: active branch of the repository)

pr_number.description: PR number to be scanned (SAST/secret scan on PRs)

scan_type.description: Specific type of scan when intent is generic

cvss_score.description: CVSS score of the vulnerability found (to trigger autonomous_critical_fix and p0_security_escalation_to_ceo rules)

severity.description: Classified finding severity (used in escalation rules)

secret_found.description: Indicates whether a secret was detected in the scan (triggers rule secret_found_immediate_action)
